---
title: "Multidisciplinary, biopsychosocial factors contributing to return to running and running related stress urinary incontinence in postpartum women"
authors: "Moore, I., James, M., Brockwell, E., Perkins, J., Jones, A. L., & Donnelly, G."
year: 2021
date: 2021-01-01
pub-journal: "British Journal of Sports Medicine"
volume: "55(22)"
doi: "10.1136/bjsports-2021-104168"
pdf: "assets/papers/2021/Moore_etal_2021.pdf"
categories: [other]
---
